<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- #| label: tbl-NONhomerule-agency_group -->
<!-- #| tbl-cap: "**Non-Home Rule Municipalities only** Uses agency_group fixed effects with grouped and summed taxing agencies. Includes log(eav) and log(est_value) in model. Uses Ptaxsim 2023.0.0. and necessary files edited last on Oct. 12th. HC1 standard errors. " -->

<!-- library(fixest) -->

<!-- nonhr_df = df %>%  -->
<!--   filter(home_rule_ind == 0 & type == "Muni") -->

<!--                data = nonhr_df, -->

<!--   mods_1, -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- #| label: tbl-school-hc1 -->
<!-- #| tbl-cap: "**Schools only** Uses agency_group fixed effects with grouped and summed taxing agencies. Includes log(eav) and log(est_value) in model. Uses Ptaxsim 2023.0.0. and necessary files edited last on Oct. 12th. HC1 standard errors. " -->

<!-- library(fixest) -->

<!-- school_df = df %>%  -->
<!--   filter(type == "School") -->

<!-- mods_1 <- list( -->


<!--     "1" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~  log(est_value) | agency_group + year, -->
<!--                data = school_df, -->
<!--                vcov = "hc1", -->
<!--                panel.id = c("agency_group", "year") -->
<!--                 ), -->


<!--   "2" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~ ln_lag_eav | agency_group + year, -->
<!--                data = school_df, -->
<!--                vcov = "hc1", -->
<!--                panel.id = c("agency_group", "year") -->
<!--                 ), -->

<!--      "3" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~ ln_lag_eav + log(est_value)*flip_assess | agency_group + year, -->
<!--                data = school_df, -->
<!--                vcov = "hc1", -->
<!--                panel.id = c("agency_group", "year") -->
<!--                 ), -->

<!--     "4" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~ log(est_value) + ln_lag_eav | agency_group + year, -->
<!--                data = school_df, -->
<!--                vcov = "hc1", -->
<!--                panel.id = c("agency_group", "year") -->
<!--                 ), -->
<!--       "4" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~ log(est_value) + ln_eav  | agency_group + year, -->
<!--                data = school_df, -->
<!--                vcov = "hc1", -->
<!--                panel.id = c("agency_group", "year") -->
<!--                 ), -->

<!--   "Interact" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~ ln_lag_eav + log(est_value) + log(est_value)*flip_assess | agency_group + year, -->
<!--                data = school_df, -->
<!--                vcov = "hc1", -->
<!--                panel.id = c("agency_group", "year") -->
<!--                 ) -->
<!--   ) -->


<!-- modelsummary::modelsummary( -->
<!--   mods_1, -->
<!--   output = "flextable", -->
<!-- # gof_map = c("nobs", "f",  "r2.within","r2.within.adjusted","complete.obs","std.error.type", "rmse"), -->
<!--               stars = TRUE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- #| label: tbl-modelsbytype -->
<!-- #| tbl-cap: "Uses agency_group fixed effects with grouped and summed taxing agencies. Includes log(eav) and log(est_value) in model. Uses Ptaxsim 2023.0.0. and necessary files edited last on Oct. 12th. HC1 standard errors. " -->

<!-- library(fixest) -->

<!-- mods_1 <- list( -->

<!--   "All Types" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~ ln_lag_eav + log(est_value)  | agency_group + year, -->
<!--                data = df, -->
<!--                vcov = "hc1", -->
<!--                panel.id = c("agency_group", "year") -->
<!--                 ), -->

<!--       "Homerule Munis" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~ ln_lag_eav + log(est_value)  | agency_group + year, -->
<!--                data = df |> filter(home_rule_ind == 1 & type == "Muni"), -->
<!--                vcov = "hc1", -->
<!--                panel.id = c("agency_group", "year") -->
<!--                 ), -->
<!--      "NonHR" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~ ln_lag_eav + log(est_value) | agency_group + year, -->
<!--                data = df |> filter(home_rule_ind == 0 & type != "School"), -->
<!--                vcov = "hc1", -->
<!--                panel.id = c("agency_group", "year") -->
<!--                 ), -->
<!--        "NonHR Munis" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~ ln_lag_eav + log(est_value) | agency_group + year, -->
<!--                data = df |> filter(home_rule_ind == 0 & type == "Muni"), -->
<!--                vcov = "hc1", -->
<!--                panel.id = c("agency_group", "year") -->
<!--                 ), -->
<!--     "Schools" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~ ln_lag_eav + log(est_value) | agency_group + year, -->
<!--                data = df |> filter(type == "School"), -->
<!--                vcov = "hc1", -->
<!--                panel.id = c("agency_group", "year") -->

<!--                 ) -->
<!--   ) -->


<!-- modelsummary::modelsummary( -->
<!--   mods_1, -->
<!--   output = "flextable", -->
<!--  #gof_map = c("nobs", "f",  "r2.within","r2.within.adjusted","complete.obs","std.error.type", "rmse"), -->
<!--               stars = TRUE -->
<!-- ) -->

<!-- ``` -->

<!-- ## Old -->

<!-- ### Old Models w/o "Estimated Value" -->

<!-- ```{r old_models} -->

<!-- library(fixest) -->

<!-- models <- list( -->
<!--   "Plain TWFE" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~ log(cty_cook_eav)  | agency_group + year,  data = grouped_manual, vcov = "newey_west", panel.id = c("agency_group", "year")), -->

<!--       "Homerule TWFE" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~ log(cty_cook_eav)  | agency_group + year,  data = grouped_manual |> filter(home_rule_ind == "1"), vcov = "newey_west", panel.id = c("agency_group", "year")), -->

<!--   "Nonhomerule" = feols(log(total_final_levy)~ log(cty_cook_eav)  | agency_group + year, vcov = "newey_west", panel.id = c("agency_group", "year"), data = grouped_manual |> filter(home_rule_ind == "0")), -->

<!--     "Nonhomerule - noschools" = feols(log(total_final_levy)~ log(cty_cook_eav)  | agency_group + year, vcov = "newey_west", panel.id = c("agency_group", "year"), data = grouped_manual |> filter(home_rule_ind == "0" & type != "School")), -->

<!--   "TWFE w/ AV Lags" = feols(log(total_final_levy)~ log(cty_cook_eav) + l(log(cty_cook_eav), 1) + l(log(cty_cook_eav), 2 ) | agency_group + year, vcov = "newey_west", panel.id = c("agency_group", "year"), data = grouped_manual), -->

<!--   "Homerule TWFE" = feols(log(total_final_levy) ~ log(cty_cook_eav) + l(log(cty_cook_eav), 1) + l(log(cty_cook_eav), 2 ) | agency_group + year,  data = grouped_manual |> filter(home_rule_ind == "1"), vcov = "newey_west", panel.id = c("agency_group", "year")), -->

<!--   "Nonhomerule" = feols(log(total_final_levy)~ log(cty_cook_eav) + l(log(cty_cook_eav), 1) + l(log(cty_cook_eav), 2 ) | agency_group + year, vcov = "newey_west", panel.id = c("agency_group", "year"), data = grouped_manual |> filter(home_rule_ind == "0")) -->

<!--   ) -->


<!-- modelsummary( -->
<!--   models, -->
<!--   output = "flextable", -->
<!--               stars = TRUE -->
<!-- ) -->


<!-- ``` -->
